title: Define use-case error variants
scenario: The application layer can compose domain and repository errors without leaking adapter response details.
instructions: Define CreateOrderUseCaseError with Domain(CreateOrderError) and Repository(RepositoryError).

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps boundary-usecase-error explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
